app.description: A modern game launcher built with React and TypeScript

dlc.title: DLC Unlocker
dlc.no_dlcs_available: This game has no available DLCs
dlc.inject_description: Inject addappid() calls into the game's Lua files

game_details.download_options_description: Choose how you want to download this game
game_details.steamtools_info_description: SteamTools automatically downloads and installs the necessary files to unlock Steam games. This will inject game files into your Steam directory.
game_details.steamtools_disabled_warning: SteamTools is currently disabled. Enable it in Settings > Download sources to use this feature.
game_details.repacks_description: Download game files from community repacks (smaller file sizes, pre-configured).
game_details.caption: Caption
game_details.auto_update_enabled_message: {{gameName}} is now on auto-update. Please restart Steam to apply changes.
game_details.denuvo_warning_message: This game uses Denuvo Anti-Tamper protection, which cannot be removed by this tool. You must manually crack the game executable first before using Goldberg emulator, otherwise the game won't work.

settings.steam_path_auto: Steam path was automatically detected from Windows Registry
settings.download_sources_description: Configure which sources are used to download game files. When enabled, Yeyodra will automatically try multiple sources to find and download the necessary files.
settings.steam_source_description: Enable SteamTools injection for Steam games. This will automatically download and install the necessary files to unlock Steam games.
settings.low_connection_mode_hint: Optimizes for slow or unstable internet by reducing image quality, disabling auto-load features, and limiting concurrent connections. Downloads remain available but use fewer connections for better stability.
settings.import_library_description: Scan and import games from your SteamTools installation into your library.
settings.no_games_found_description: No games were found in the SteamTools directory. Make sure SteamTools is properly installed.
settings.cloud_save_description: Update the game database to enable cloud save detection for newly released games. This downloads the latest save file locations and configurations.
settings.database_hint: The game database is automatically updated on app startup. Use this button if you want to manually update it.
settings.cloud_save_info: Cloud Save feature automatically detects and backs up your game saves using an advanced detection system. The database contains save file locations and patterns for thousands of games across all platforms.
settings.automatic_detection_description: Automatically finds save files for supported games
settings.local_backups_description: Creates local backups of your game saves
settings.easy_restore_description: Restore your saves anytime from backup history

game_options.title: Options
game_options.executable_description: Path of the file that will be executed when "Play" is clicked
game_options.danger_zone_description: Remove this game from your library and delete all associated files
game_options.remove_game_confirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {{game_name}}? This will remove it from your library and delete all SteamTools files (LUA, manifest, BIN).

downloads.no_downloads_description: Start downloading games from the Catalogue or Game Details page

profile.no_games_description: Start downloading games to build your library

achievements.no_achievements_description: This game doesn't have any achievements

add_custom_game.title: Add Custom Game
add_custom_game.description: Add a game that's not in the catalogue to your library
add_custom_game.fill_required: Please fill in all required fields
